learned_codec_embedding.concept: Train end-to-end encoder/decoder for Opus survival

llm_semantic_compression.concept: Use LLM to compress data 5-10x before encoding

vocoder_parameter_injection.concept: Modulate data into Opus vocoder parameters

adversarial_perturbations.concept: Use adversarial training for imperceptible data channels

joint_optimization.concept: Train encoder/decoder pair specifically for Opus codec

execution_plan.week_2: Train learned codec - match vs beat traditional
execution_plan.week_3: Add vocoder backdoor - layer additional capacity
execution_plan.week_4: Validate on real Opus - prove 10-15 kbps
